bank_defaults.cash_advance: Rs.199 per transaction (cash advance not applicable for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card)
bank_defaults.cash_interest: Interest on cash advances is charged at the same finance (interest) rate as purchases and outstanding balances, applied from the date of transaction until paid in full (no separate interest-free period for cash advances). Monthly Rate 0.71%-3.85% / Annual Rate 8.5%-46.2% for all other IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards; FIRST Private Credit Card Monthly Rate 0.75% / Annual Rate 9%. Rates are dynamic and can change/increase up to 3.99% per month (47.88% Annualised) or decrease up to ~0.71% per month (8.50% Annualised) at the Bank's discretion.
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: 15% of Total Amount Due as of the previous statement minus any payments received before the due date (subject to a minimum of Rs.100 and a maximum of Rs.1,300). FIRST SWYP Credit Card: same 15% with maximum of Rs.6,000. FIRST Private Credit Card: Nil. FIRST Digital RuPay: as per Primary Credit Card. Illustration tiers: <100 None; 500 -> 100; 5,000 -> 750; 8,000 -> 1,200; 10,000 and above -> 1,300
bank_defaults.interest_free_days: up to 45 days (grace period shall not exceed 45 days; not applicable if previous statement balance not cleared in full)
bank_defaults.source_section: Sec 2 Finance Charges table p.2-3 (All other IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards: Monthly 0.71%-3.85% / Annual 8.5%-46.2%; FIRST Private 0.75%/9%); Sec 3 Other Fees and Charges p.3-4 (Cash advance, Late payment, Markup Charges on Foreign currency); Sec 3 Interest-Free Period p.11 (45 days)
